title: Fresh Paintings VR
description: Resource Pack adding 3D paintings and item frame models tailored for Vivecraft!
body:
# Fresh Paintings for Vivecraft

**A port of [Fresh Paintings](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-paintings) by Cyber, made visually compatible with [Vivecraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/vivecraft).**

---

## 🖼️ About the Original Pack

> *This resource pack gives paintings and item frames in Minecraft a full visual upgrade. Every painting now has its own unique sprite when viewed in your inventory, GUI, or hotbar, so you can easily tell which one you're holding without placing it down.*

> *When you hold a painting or an item frame, it appears as a 3D model in your hand, giving it a more realistic and immersive feel. The same 3D treatment applies to item frames, so they look just as detailed and cohesive as the paintings.*

> *Whether you're decorating a base, building a gallery, or just want Minecraft's art to feel a little more alive, this pack adds that extra layer of polish without changing the original charm of the game.*

---

## 🥽 Vivecraft Compatibility

This version ensures all custom painting models are rendered correctly in **Vivecraft's VR environment**, maintaining full immersion.

---

## 📦 Other Awesome Packs for VR

* [📚 Better, Fresher 3D Books VR](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-fresher-3d-books-vr)
* [🪣 Fresh Buckets VR](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-buckets-vr)
* [🪴 Fresh Flowers and Plants VR](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-flowers-and-plants-vr)

* [💎 Fresh Ores and Ingots VR](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-ores-and-ingots-vr)
